queryList.1: hp_master: select city_id, city, time_zone, is_fix_point, sort_distance_wight, city_name_en, is_open_faraway, activity_status, inlet_tips, share_picture, travel_mode,is_use_index_module,age_limit,city_shop_sort,city_shop_evaluation_config,is_use_index_module_en, take_meal_after_out,driver_operation_distance_limit_type,open_languge_page,map_resource, polling_on_off,excise_calculate_type,is_del,city_code,delivery_map_resource,order_tax_type, tab_voucher,deliverable_action from city_config where city = '九江市' and is_del = 0 limit 1
queryList.2: hp_master: SELECT ubc.*,ubrc.city_name from hp_user_benefit_config ubc left join hp_user_benefit_red_packet_city ubrc on ubc.benefit_no=ubrc.benefit_no where ubrc.city_id=508 and ubc.start_time <= 1749127470441 and ubc.end_time >=1749127470441 and ubc.benefit_type=1 and ubrc.del=0 and ubc.del=0 and ubc.config_status=0
queryList.3: hp_master: select id, user_id, collect_source, red_packet_id, create_time, update_time, device_id, batch_no from hp_user_new_red_packet_record where device_id = '7c5e3964-6ffc-440b-8166-c625281afd7a' and type = 1 group by batch_no
queryList.4: hp_master: select count(*) from user_log ul,`user` u where ul.user_id = u.user_id and u.new_user_status = 1 and `device_id` = '7c5e3964-6ffc-440b-8166-c625281afd7a' and `user_type` in (0, 1)
